MARGHERITA PIZZA, $14
Handmade and baked in Brooklyn, New York. Coal oven pizza with a slightly charred, crispy crust that's topped with a tangy tomato sauce, mozzarella, and sprinkled grana cheese. The pie is finished with fresh basil.
‚Äã
PEPPERONI PIZZA, $15
Handmade and baked in brooklyn, new york. Coal oven pizza with a slightly charred, crispy crust that's topped with a tangy tomato sauce, mozzarella, and sprinkled grana cheese. The pie is finished with hormel's rosa grande "Cup & char" pepperoni.
